title: Norwegian Kjottkaker with Butter Biscuits
description: Traditional Norwegian meatballs served with butter biscuits, a hearty breakfast or brunch option.

ingredients.name: kjottkaker (Norwegian meatballs)
ingredients.notes: Available pre-made or homemade, using ground meat and breadcrumbs

instructions: Bake butter biscuits for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the kjottkaker and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the kjottkaker with warm butter biscuits.
